rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Request For Preliminary Injunction; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 5, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Request For Preliminary Injunction; DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Defendant's Motion to Vacate Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED. Defendant's Request for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. = (501/CFH)
